emails.subject: Welcome to the RC12 Showcase Portfolio
emails.preview: A new way to explore heritage, biodiversity, maps, art, and science.
emails.body: Start with the top showcase assets and learn why each was selected for recognition, education, and launch validation.

emails.subject: How the showcase was selected
emails.preview: Recognition, visual appeal, educational value, commercial value, and global significance.
emails.body: RC12 turns portfolio intelligence into launch-ready content without changing architecture, governance, agents, or ADRs.

emails.subject: The first launch products
emails.preview: Posters, puzzles, prints, calendars, and books ready for validation.
emails.body: Review the top 10 products recommended for the first validation wave.

emails.subject: World Heritage Icons lead the showcase
emails.preview: Global places selected for recognition and educational power.
emails.body: Explore collections that balance heritage, geography, and culture across the RC12 launch portfolio.

emails.subject: Biodiversity and climate collections
emails.preview: From big cats to coral reefs and natural wonders.
emails.body: These collections bring conservation, climate, and classroom value into the launch content factory.

emails.subject: Maps, science, and public-domain art
emails.preview: Differentiated collections for education and giftability.
emails.body: Historic maps, public-domain masterworks, and Smithsonian science assets widen the showcase beyond travel icons.

emails.subject: Flagship species, stronger stories
emails.preview: Lion, tiger, panda, elephant, polar bear, and reef stories.
emails.body: RC12 species content links biodiversity recognition to conservation learning and family-friendly products.

emails.subject: Why biodiversity belongs in the launch
emails.body: Species-led posters, puzzles, calendars, and books help balance the showcase portfolio with nature and climate themes.

emails.subject: Conservation content for classrooms
emails.preview: Turn species recognition into learning prompts.
emails.body: Use flagship species content to introduce ecosystems, climate, stewardship, and global public memory.

emails.subject: Top 10 products to launch first
emails.body: Start with Machu Picchu, Giza, Sunflowers, World Heritage Icons, African Lion, and other high-scoring showcase products.

emails.subject: Why posters and puzzles lead validation
emails.preview: Fast formats for visual learning and demand testing.
emails.body: Posters, framed prints, canvas prints, puzzles, calendars, and books each serve a distinct launch role.

emails.subject: From showcase to campaign
emails.preview: Product copy, Pinterest pins, SEO pages, YouTube scripts, and email sequences.
emails.body: RC12 packages every top showcase product with reusable launch content for validation-only marketing.
